LandingPage.Title: LikeButter
LandingPage.Description:
Everything Melts with Butter.
팬심이 녹아들어 특별한 콘텐츠가 되는 공간.
LandingPage.FeaturesTitle: Where all your emotions become art
LandingPage.FeaturesDescription: LikeButter's AI fairy 'Butter' will guide you to melt your fan sentiments into diverse content.
LandingPage.FeatureButterTalksDescription: Share the stories you want to share with your favorite artist with AI. It all starts with pouring out your emotions.
LandingPage.FeatureButterBeatsDescription: Create a one-of-a-kind fan song with your emotions, or make a cover song with your favorite artist's voice.
LandingPage.FeatureButterBrushDescription: Complete AI fan art by typing the image that comes to your mind or uploading a picture.
LandingPage.FeatureButterCutsDescription: Easily edit sensational fan-made videos by combining generated images, music, and your own videos.
LandingPage.HowItWorksDescription: See your ideas come to life with just a few clicks.
LandingPage.UnlockCreativityDescription: Start for free and upgrade to the Pro plan when you need more professional creative activities.
